meeting.track_notes: Turf. 2800m triangular-shaped circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. Poly. 2000m track inside the turf circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. DRAW: Turf: Low-num-

races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Many first timers. Betting should be your best guide. Of those that have run, TIGER CODY made a fair debut and should come on with the experience. QUEST OF VALOR was tried in a feature race last time and can only improve. He has shown potential. OMKHULU BOSS was disappointing in his local debut in the soft after a smart previous effort. He can do better. LENOXX was a long way back on debut but is well bred and likely to come on from that run. COAST OF THE SUN is bred in the purple but has a wide draw to contend with.

races.race_name: BET WITH THE BEST MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.race_type: For 2 yof R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Most are unexposed and many are well bred so keep tabs on the market. TOO FAST TO FIESTA showed promise on her Western Cape debut but disappointed next time. She could show much more. Well-bred BOOGY found limited market support in a modest debut but has room to improve. LAGERTHA THE QUEEN was very green on debut but has the best of the draws. MOON GIRL and LAST MARGARITA can only improve but have wide draws to overcome. PACIFIC MOOD strikes as a likely first-timer.

races.race_name: WSB SLOTS AT ITS BEST MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Open maiden. HOP HOP SPINNEKOP was much improved last run and the step up in trip should be right up her alley. SPLASH OF LOVE has run some decent races and could be effective. ANNIE’S SONG is lightly raced but has shown some ability. She gets first-time blinkers. GREEK HEIRESS is proven over the trip and from the best of the draws should feature promi- nently. BRIGHTSUNNYDAY has had one good sprint in five outings but the step up in trip could suit.

races.race_name: WSB CASINO AT ITS BEST CONDITIONS PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: High-class field but form not easy to decipher with many warming up for future features. Justin Snaith saddles four of the seven runners with the Hollywoodbets Durban July in pros- pect for all four. LEGAL COUNSEL will not do his July weights any damage with a win and was doing his best work late behind Questioning last time out. NOTE TO SELF was runner-up to crack filly Wish List in the Cape Derby. It could be short for him and his handicap also needs to be watched. OKAVANGO must have a say. EIGHT ON EIGHTEEN retains top-class ability and could be ready to show again.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Competitive handicap. PAST IS PROLOGUE took her chances in the Grade 1 Empress Club Stakes last time out but made no show. She takes a big drop in class and should feature given her previous efforts. ALLTHEBOYSIVELOVED has consistent Cape form over the trip and improved fitted with a tongue-tie. Versatile HAPPY FORTUNE shoulders top weight but is over her optimum trip and could run on strongly again. GORGEOUS GIRL has found form and a four-point rise in the handicap could test her, but she must have an each-way say.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: FAST AND FREE turned in a decent effort on local debut only finding one better. He can score. JAZZ FESTIVAL has been consistent over shorter but this step up in trip could bring out the best. SERPENTINE FIRE showed up well from a wide draw last run and is better off with both NO PRESSURE and FAST AND FREE who look the biggest threats to his chances. Lightly raced NO PRESSURE has room for improvement. SPECTACULAR raced from a wide draw on the Polytrack last time and made no show. He could go a lot better back on turf.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Proving ground for the Hollywoodbets Durban July for some. REGULATION could propel himself into the July with a solid win. He has more to come. NATIVE RULER has nothing to lose with top weight. Contracted rider JP van der Merwe rides stablemate REGULATION who gets 8kg from NATIVE RULER. TRUST is a top-class three-year-old. Winner of the Grade 2 Dingaans he could raise his game further before a crack at the big ones. THE ULTIMATE KING has solid Highveld form and was narrowly beaten by Fire Attack last time out. ISIVIVANE is out to prove himself from a plum gate.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MISS WORLD is best weighted and could make a successful local debut if enjoying the track. She is racing after a rest. PLUS FOUR has consistent Highveld form to recommend him. He must go close on his latest effort having drawn well. DONQUERARI is always dangerous and seldom out of the money. KALAHARI ROLLER ran an eye-catching race with a 4kg apprentice claim last time and should repeat. Very little went according to plan in his Western Cape raid but COGNAC showed potential before making the trip. He is dropping in distance.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Racing switches to the Polytrack. MIGHTY ZAMBEZI was an easy winner last time out and showed marked improvement in first-time cheek pieces. He was well supported in the arket. SUPER FAST is over his best course and distance and has been touched off in useful company in his last two. RED BOMBER looks ready for a top performance on form. THE MASK ay be the pick of Glen Kotzen’s pair given that he is in form and will have stable rider Chad Little aboard. FROSTBITE was a comfortable winner in just his second outing in the soft. He could ve more to come.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: HAH LAH LAH was well supported in the market on debut and duly obliged. He looks progressive and can follow up. JP’S PALACE has been mixing it with the big guns of late and has been far from disgraced. He should be right there from a favourable draw. WHAT A FORTUNE also showed up well in classy company in his local debut. The stable is in good form and he should make a bold bid. WILD AT WAR goes well on the poly and has a definite money chance. ROLLO THE VIKING and GOTTA GO EDDIE can’t be discounted either.
